mapper.insert: insert into homework_submit ( homework_id, student_id, submit_content, submit_time, status ) values ( #{homeworkId}, #{studentId}, #{submitContent}, #{submitTime}, #{status} )
mapper.select:
select hs.id,
h.title as homework_title,
c.course_name,
u.real_name as student_name,
hs.submit_content,
hs.submit_time,
hs.grade_status,
sr.score
from homework_submit hs
left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id
left join course c on h.course_id = c.id
left join user u on hs.student_id = u.id
left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id
order by hs.id desc

select hs.id, h.title as homework_title, c.course_name, u.real_name as student_name, hs.submit_content, hs.submit_time, hs.grade_status, sr.score from homework_submit hs left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id left join course c on h.course_id = c.id left join user u on hs.student_id = u.id left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id where hs.student_id = #{studentId} order by hs.id desc

select hs.id, h.title as homework_title, c.course_name, u.real_name as student_name, hs.submit_content, hs.submit_time, hs.grade_status, sr.score from homework_submit hs left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id left join course c on h.course_id = c.id left join user u on hs.student_id = u.id left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id where h.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by hs.id desc
select count(*) from homework_submit hs left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id where h.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
select count(*) from homework_submit where student_id = #{studentId}
select avg(sr.score) from score_record sr left join homework_submit hs on sr.submit_id = hs.id left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id where h.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
select avg(sr.score) from score_record sr left join homework_submit hs on sr.submit_id = hs.id where hs.student_id = #{studentId}
select count(*) from homework_submit hs left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id where h.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and hs.grade_status = 'UN_GRADED'
